SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03

JUDGE DIANE WICK RICHARD DUDUM, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLFS. JOSE TORRES & YOLANDA TORRES, IN PRO PER. 9:40 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT. YOLAND TORRES. PARTIES STIPULATE THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE PLTFS. & AGAINST DEFTS, TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD BY PLTFS. COUNSEL. PLTS. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE TORRES, YOLANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 610 BACON STREET, SF. CA. 94134, STAYED UNTIL FEB-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
